title: Croatian Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup made with tender chicken, Croatian noodles, and a touch of sweetness. Perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: Croatian noodles
ingredients.notes: available in most European grocery stores

instructions: Bring the chicken broth and water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the chicken breast to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the Croatian noodles to the pot and cook according to the package instructions.
Add the chopped sweet potato to the pot and cook until tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
